summary_lines: External-service provider behavior is loaded from overlay-discovered configuration.
Built-in providers intentionally expose quote/handoff workflows only; direct submission remains disabled unless implemented explicitly.

notes: Direct API surfaces are documented externally, but GENtle v1 keeps this as quote/handoff only.
Use sequence/container lineage artifacts as the source bundle for quote handoff.
Requests should preserve prior provider project/order identifiers when known.
Existing GENtle PCR-mutagenesis reports should become the service-ready source bundle.
GENtle should use protein-to-DNA handoff records as the preferred project source.
Manual quote/order handoff only in GENtle v1.

required_followup: Review protein-to-DNA/codon-optimization handoff before vendor submission.
Provide mutation table or variant list in the source target.
Review generated service-ready content before any vendor submission.
Open GeneArt dashboard/form route for quote or ordering; do not store PO/shipping/API secrets in GENtle project state.
account_enablement_notes: Direct GeneArt API ordering requires Thermo Fisher / GeneArt account enablement outside GENtle.
GENtle does not store API credentials, purchase orders, or shipping details in project state.
This implementation creates deterministic preflight and handoff/quote packets only.
warnings: Live GeneArt API submission/status/QAD retrieval is not implemented.
Protein expression and mutagenesis are intentionally quote/handoff first until official direct API documentation is available.

notes: Ordering can proceed through WOP or email with the pre-formatted Excel order form.
GENtle v1 prepares quote/order handoff artifacts only.
Mapped to metabion m-block DNA Fragments & Libraries.
Biosafety questionnaire follow-up may be required depending on sequence content and local policy.
Generate quote in WOP; verified accounts can download PDF quotes.
PO may be required when converting a quote into an order.

channels.display_name: Email with pre-formatted Excel order file
notes: Attach the current pre-formatted Excel order form.
New customers should include shipping/billing information separately; GENtle must not store these details.
Contact customer service for OCI/Open Catalog Interface setup; no OCI automation is implemented in GENtle v1.

field_map.name: Name of the oligo/s
field_map.sequence: Sequence of the oligo/s in 5'-3' orientation

notes: The order-form page lists DNA Oligo single tube as a downloadable form.
The order-form page lists m-block DNA Fragments & Libraries and a Biosafety Questionnaire.

required_followup: Confirm oligo name, 5'-3' sequence, yield range, purification, delivery form, and modifications before sending an order form.

warnings: m-block requests may require a biosafety questionnaire depending on sequence content and account policy.
required_followup: Confirm whether the m-block sequence triggers a biosafety questionnaire before submitting through WOP or email.
Do not place PO numbers, account credentials, shipping, or billing details in GENtle project state.

default_delivery_hints: Prefer dry delivery unless the requester specifies water/buffer and concentration.
default_purification_hints: Use request-provided purification when present; otherwise confirm with the requester/vendor before order submission.
default_qc_hints: Use vendor default QC unless the request or local policy requires additional QC documentation.
required_followup: No vendor order was submitted by GENtle.
Use WOP to create the quote and convert it to an order only after human review.
If using email, attach the current Excel order form from metabion and include required order fields.
PO/account/shipping/billing details stay outside GENtle project state.
For new or unverified WOP accounts, complete account verification before relying on WOP quote generation.
account_enablement_notes: metabion WOP quote generation requires a verified online account.
Email ordering accepts pre-formatted Excel order forms sent to oligo@metabion.com.
OCI/eProcurement setup should be handled with metabion customer service outside GENtle.
warnings: GENtle v1 does not scrape WOP, submit orders, or store credentials.
Vendor templates are referenced by URL; local template-backed generation is optional and may be unavailable.
